remove_pbc.zh: 是否需要使用移除 PBC后的文件? (y/n)
remove_pbc.en: Do you want to use the file without condensate PBC? (y/n)

cover_free_chain_save_path.zh: 是否需要覆盖已存在的自由链保存路径? (y/n) Do you want to cover the existing free chain save path? (y/n)
cover_free_chain_save_path.en: Do you want to cover the existing free chain save path? (y/n)

calculate_molecules.zh:
请输入您想要计算质量密度分布时需要包括的分子, 以逗号分隔, 如 "1,2"。
如需计算全部分子, 请输入 all 或直接回车：
calculate_molecules.en: Please input the molecules you want to calculate the mass density distribution for, separated by commas. If you want to calculate for all molecules, please input all or press enter.

calculate_domain.zh: 若只需要计算结构域，请输入该结构域的起始残基编号和末尾残基编号（从 1 开始），以-分隔，如 159-522, 否则请直接回车。注: 只支持选择单个分子计算。请输入：
calculate_domain.en:
If you only want to calculate the mass density distribution for a specific domain, please input the start and end residue numbers of the domain, separated by a hyphen (-), e.g., 159-522. Otherwise, please press enter.
Note: Only one molecule can be selected for calculation.

name_domain.zh: 是否给此结构域命名？请输入名称，否则直接回车：
name_domain.en: Do you want to name this domain? Please input the name, or press Enter directly.

balance_cut.zh: 请输入需要截取的平衡后的文件索引，格式为‘开始,结束’, 例如: 1000,2000, 直接回车则不截取:
balance_cut.en: Please input the balance cut index, in the format of 'start,end', e.g., 1000,2000. Press enter directly to not cut.

calculate_mass_density_distribution_type.zh:
可计算的质量密度分布类型有: sphere (球状凝聚体), axis (有取向的棒状凝聚体), slab (平板模拟)
请输入需要计算的质量密度分布类型, 直接回车则计算 sphere 类型:
calculate_mass_density_distribution_type.en:
Class of mass density distribution that can be calculated: sphere (sphere condensate) / axis (有取向的棒状凝聚体) / slab (slab model)
Please input the type of mass density distribution that you want to calculate, or press Enter directly to calculate sphere type:

invalid.zh: 请输入 sphere, axis, 或 slab 类型, 或直接回车计算 sphere 类型
invalid.en: Invalid input. Please input sphere, axis, or slab. Press Enter directly to calculate sphere type.

bin_size.zh: 计算质量密度分布时使用的 bin 大小为
bin_size.en: The bin size of the mass density distribution is
